title: Delicious tea
description: Adds 14 types of tea that works similarly to suspicious stews!
body:
Adds 14 types of tea that works similarly to suspicious stews!

Tea can be crafted from water bottle and any flower from which suspicious stew can be crafted.
The effect and duration of tea depends on the flower, just like in suspicious stews.

![Tea in recipe book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f647d5e27a7b70b97db86ba341dfa678975109cc.png)
